creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
But wait, there's more.

You and I both get errors. Look for this in our attached logs.

make[3]: "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/bacula13-client/work/bacula-13.0.1/platforms/osx/Makefile" line 23: Unknown modifier "//www.openssl.org/source/ 2>/dev/null| perl -ne '/openssl-(${OPENSSL_VERSION_BASE}[a-z]+"
